category_sources: source_facts.description says Artifact Ratification Framework; official Ratify docs describe it as a verification engine for artifact security metadata.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ratify; official site and docs use the Ratify project name.

tags_sources: Official docs describe artifact security metadata verification and deployment admission; source_facts.executables lists ratify CLI.
